text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Recreational Activities/Sports * Blindness 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Native American Community Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low vision equipment, classes, workshops, and activities including retreats and overnight getaways. Also provides care team training for those who work with people with vision loss and presentations for caregivers and organizations. 43233 SE Oral Hull Road Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Adults with sight loss and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 668-6195 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND
